description: AC-2/AC-3 + EX-2: wrong-recipient releases open a wrong-disclosure incident on the PHI-breach workflow; the clinician harm review is tasked and a materialized clinical decision escalates immediately.

cases.name: AC-2: a result released to the wrong patient opens a wrong-disclosure incident linked to the PHI-breach workflow
AC-3 + EX-2: the harm review is tasked; a materialized clinical decision escalates immediately to the treating provider
